task_completion.description: Load and join the required tables from the HDF5 dataset.

task_completion.description: Identify the CBD and calculate Euclidean distances for all valid jobs.

task_completion.description: Export CBD details to a JSON file.

task_completion.description: Calculate metrics for the top three sectors and save to a CSV file.

task_completion.description: Generate and save a CDF line chart for the top three sectors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A line chart showing the Cumulative Distribution Function (CDF) of jobs by distance for the top 3 sectors, including a legend, is visible in the notebook output or code shows saving it to 'job_sprawl_cdf.png'.
